title: Hey Lamba Lamba Lyrics Yaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Hey Lamba Lamba
Singer(s):Devan Ekambaram, Divya Vijay
Movie: Yaan
Music: Harrish Jeyaraj
Lyrics : Vaali

Hey Lamba Lamba
yen vandhaai en munba
pottale paarvayil ambaa. (2)

Paar nanba nanba
paadava or venba
yaarumey padaadha penbaa.

Aval azhagaal ennai eerthaal
sevvanalai ennul vaarthaal.
Oru malai poludhum coffe
cup-um serndhadhai pole.

Naan thaniye irundhen theevaa
en madiyil vilundhaal poovaa
Oru pattaam poochi
pattum padaamal pattadhu ingae
thottadhu engae.

oh o oh h... yeri pochaa.
... meeri pochaa.

Hey Lamba Lamba
yen vandhaai en munba
pottale paarvayil ambaa.
EVERY BODY.

Avalin padam pottu
azhagaai oru tattoo
adaiye vendaamey adhu podhumey.

Adadaa aval voice
ever lasting choice
caller tune aakkida mobile kenjumey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hey Lamba Lamba'?

The song conveys a playful and romantic vibe, celebrating love and attraction between two individuals.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Yaan'?

This song is featured in a romantic setting, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Hey Lamba Lamba'?

The song is sung by Devan Ekambaram and Divya Vijay.

Who composed the music for 'Yaan'?

The music for Yaan was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Hey Lamba Lamba' released?

The song was released on May 12, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Hey Lamba Lamba', the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a lively atmosphere that reflects the joy of young love. The song features a charming duet that showcases the chemistry between the characters in the movie Yaan. It evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect choice for celebrations and romantic occasions. With its catchy tune and engaging vocals, this song is sure to leave listeners with a smile.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hey Lamba Lamba from Yaan is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. With the melodious voices of Devan Ekambaram and Divya Vijay, this track is a delightful blend of catchy beats and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of love as you immerse yourself in this enchanting musical journey!
stanzaMeanings: Hey Lamba Lamba, why did you come in front of me, like a surprise?
Look, my friend, singing a verse, no girl can sing like this.
If she looks beautiful, she pulls me in with her words. Like a flower and a coffee cup coming together.
I was alone, if she falls on me, will it be like a flower? A butterfly that doesn't land here, where is it?
oh o oh h... it has gone up. ... it has flown away.
Hey Lamba Lamba, why did you come in front of me, like a surprise? EVERY BODY.
Her picture is beautiful, a tattoo of it is not needed, that is enough.
Her voice is an everlasting choice, it becomes a caller tune on my mobile.
